creator: ap@myway.noses.com
text:
The port can't be compiled as it doesn't find its distfile anywhere. Which
isn't exactly a miracle.

Fix: 

Change its Makefile

-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	utils/file/managers/mc
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	utils/file/managers/mc/devel
How-To-Repeat: 
	
cd /usr/ports/misc/mc
make
